artefact.description: An SME customer's bill, rendered and passing every render-layer check.
artefact.headline: Bill totals reconcile; VAT arithmetic internally consistent.

the_catch: An SME was billed on the residential/household code path: the 20% figure looked right for a business but the underlying treatment (VAT class selection, absent non-commodity revenue lines) was the household path misapplied to a business customer. Same class surfaced three times (C6 SME-as-household, a 4.3-sigma bill, missing non-commodity revenue) before it was fixed as a CLASS, not an instance -- which is exactly why R10 exists.
